name: Ninja Former
short_description: Dive into the fast-paced world of NinjaFormer, a 2.5D platformer where you control a skilled parkour ninja. Navigate hardcore levels, pick up powerful abilities, and face off against ninja and samurai enemies. With no checkpoints until the end, only the swiftest will prevail!
detailed_description:
NinjaFormer is an adrenaline-pumping 2.5D platformer that challenges you to complete levels as swiftly as possible. You play as a skilled parkour ninja, navigating through a series of hardcore levels where every second counts. With no checkpoints except at the end of each stage, you must rely on your agility, precision, and the powerful abilities you pick up along the way to survive.

Each level is designed to test your reflexes and strategic thinking, pitting you against formidable enemies that resemble ninjas and samurais. The game’s minimalist yet captivating design immerses you in a world where timing and skill are everything. Whether you’re racing against the clock or mastering the perfect run, NinjaFormer offers a thrilling experience for platformer enthusiasts. Can you conquer each level and become the ultimate ninja?
